examples: We were interested in pushing forward certain issues and getting up on our soapbox about them.
If you can't take their wine away, you should certainly try to take away their soapbox.
And other developers will be taking their turns on the Soapbox.
Soapbox Science aims to make a real difference to the visibility and perception of women in science.
Since its inception in 2011, over 85 women have presented at Soapbox Science events around the UK and Ireland.
